message: Jake
Yuriko
Patricia
Gloria
Cindy
Kristy
Are you having fun properly?
Of course.
That's great to hear.
Is there something you need, detective?
You seem to have gotten used to this atmosphere.
It's nice if you talk not just to me, but with everyone.
I feel a bit nervous.
Pfft.
Oh no,
San! You’re fine, just hang in there.
Okay.
I'm sorry about earlier.
No, I don’t mind at all.
Lately, I've been somewhat emotionally unstable. It might be influenced by my father.
Don't worry too much about me.
Yes, thank you.
I'm glad I can talk with you.
View
Talk
Listen
End conversation

The surroundings.
About　the　party.
About the movie.
About that.

's　case
's　case
Jennifer's case
Meryl's case

's　case

Is it about the movie this time?
Yeah, sort of.
I hear it's some sort of baseball story. I wonder why now, though.
I was expecting a big sci-fi blockbuster, but with Guy in it, that's probably a stretch.
Maybe they wanted to use Guy and turned it into a baseball thing?
No way?
Nope, it might actually be that.
I like my dad when he's filming a movie.
Is it because you’re moved by the working dad's image?
He's coolest when he's like that. The rest of the time, he's just a messy problem. Hehe.
I'm nervous too before filming starts. Sounds weird, right?
Meryl and Jennifer
It's like they're throwing bombs at each other.
Right? What on earth is the director thinking?
What do you mean?
Well, those two are like cats and dogs, right? It seems like it was tough to convince them to co-star.
I pray that the filming ends safely.
Yeah, she's not the type that hangs around me. Just watching her is enough fun.
Haha, that's true.
Well,
is he her boyfriend?
No way, that’s not it.
Phew.
Hmm, yeah.
What’s that about?
Nah, it’s not like I’m saying anything.
Sorry.
Maybe...
...you’re not saying anything weird, are you?
Weird? I don’t think I’m asking anything strange.
But why?
No, she sometimes spreads outrageous stuff.
Oh　my!
But I think she’s funny and a good person.
I,
would be happy if I could get along with you.
It seems you're doing sales activities, but there were complaints, so I warned you.
Wow, I'm really sorry about that.
I think you’re a good person, but that kind of thing is a bit troublesome here.
Yeah, that’s completely fair. I’ll scold her properly later.
I’m sorry for saying such things.
But I envy you. Being able to act so normally, no matter where you are or who you're with.
Uh.
That can be said to be her strong point, but I’m really troubled by it.
But it's not like she's doing anything wrong.
I wish I was born with a personality like that.
Tonny is
Yeah, just the type you see, but really, who knows?
I don’t know, though.
First of all, I don't really get why I can talk with my dad.
Doesn't it feel more like work colleagues?
Work colleagues.
? There’s not even a bit of a direct connection, you know?
He doesn't have very good rumors surrounding him, huh?
I wonder why?
Even if he's skilled in stage directing, he's probably lacking in other areas.
I see.
If possible, I think it's better to avoid getting involved with him.
I hate to say this, but I'm really not good with him.
He must be talking bad about me, right?
No, that's not the case.
It's fine, I know. For some reason, I've been made his target since long ago.
You know, he's the type who seems to enjoy slandering others. He spreads any little thing around. He's a very rude man.
Isn't that a bit of an exaggeration?
No, not at all. It's not exaggerated in the slightest.
I just don't get my father's mindset for getting close to someone like that.
Huh?
It's an agent.
I hear that's the case. I'm not really in the loop about that stuff.
Really?
I thought detectives were really knowledgeable, so that's surprising.
I guess it’s just that I don’t know enough.
Oh, I don't mind that sort of thing.
It's really, very
feeling, like a parent-child or sibling vibe.
They're popular, so they must be worried about it.
Yeah, but I wish they were a bit nicer to people other than just those.
I would be happy if you were kind to others too.
I think she's kind of hard to approach.
That might be a misunderstanding.
Is that so? Maybe it's because there's this vibe that you can't tell what someone of Chinese descent is thinking.
I might be disliked by her.
I might be disliked.
I said, but,
why do you think that?
Because I'm making her my enemy.
Huh, is that so?
No, not really, I don't mean it that way,
but it seems like you do.
It's actually a hassle for me since I'm getting weird misunderstandings.
It's my first time today too, but she really is cute.
She's popular in ads and TV dramas, and it seems she plans to break into movies and seriously pursue her career as an actress.
Oh really?
You're pretty knowledgeable about this.
Well, I do check the cast of my dad's movies every time.
Guys typically like that kind of type, right? I find more intellectual women to be more attractive, though.
I don't think you can say that universally.
Still, I think that's the case in most situations.
If you're that curious, you should talk to her.
Have you tried talking to her?
No, not yet.
She seemed really worried, so please reach out to her, okay?
Sure.
That's an honor.
So guys really do like that kind of thing, huh?
Yeah.
Did you not feel anything at all?
Feel　anything?
I don't think I felt anything in particular.
Are you perhaps an incredibly insensitive type?
W-Well, is that so?
You're actually the most interesting person here right now.
That's just because I'm an ordinary guy.
What's that supposed to mean? Are you trying to brush it off?
Brush off what?
It's fine, after all, I'm just...
Forget it.
From the perspective of a woman like me, she's cute.
Yeah, she's really cute. Being a popular one, she has a different kind of glow.
Girls like that deserve kindness from everyone.
Because she's certainly attractive, isn't she?
I don't need sympathy.
It's just that I've been interested in you, and I got a bit annoyed.
Huh?
Oh!
I'm sorry, I said something weird.
I wanted to be born like that.
Jennifer is
The Structure of Madness
a famous actress, right?
That's for sure.
It's an R-rated movie about multiple personalities. Didn't you see it?
I don't watch many movies.
I thought it was a well-made film. You should find some time to watch the video next time; you won't regret it.
It's my first time meeting her. She's quiet, completely different from her character in the movie.
She must be a typically shy woman.
I think that's probably true, but she played a bold and sexy woman in the movie, so the image...
is a woman my father is interested in right now.
Do you know that my dad was dating Meryl?
Oh, yeah.
No, I'm not really up to date on that sort of topic.
It seems like Meryl wants to marry my dad.
I should probably allow Meryl and my father to marry, but I just don't get along with Meryl.
Hmph.
Yeah, that's a problem.
Isn't it? It's not that I'm afraid of my father being taken away.
I just really don't want them to get married, that’s all.
Do I really have to admit that honestly?
My father, you know.
Yeah, I think he's a good dad. I appreciate that he raised me all on his own after my mom passed away.
Oh, is that so?
I made you think of something unpleasant, didn’t I?
Oh come on, you have nothing to apologize for. Besides, we were just talking about dad.
Yeah, I get that.
But, I'm sorry.
If you keep that attitude, you'll end up thinking everything that happens in the world is your fault.
You know, dad is kind of spoiled because mom passed away early. You wouldn't expect it from his rugged face, right?
Uh, yeah. That's true.
Artists might need a boy-like sensitivity, but for him, it just turns into being a brat.
That's...
a bit...
hard to imagine.
That's why he always needs someone. Even as a tyrannical director with a megaphone, he can’t manage without support.
Does dad need a wife, I wonder?
It seems like he needs someone who understands him.
Everyone needs that sort of thing.
But a good listener who’s just a yes-man won't do him any good. And yet, dad seeks a yes-man type of understanding.
Might as well let that slide, right?
I don’t want to see that weakness in my dad.
I don’t want to silently watch dad become a worthless man.
If that's the case...
you know him better, right?
Well, I’m not so sure about that.
But he’s your best friend, right?
True, but...
the Guy I know isn’t the popular major league player Guy.
Hmm, that's kind of a tough one. But still, I understand what you’re getting at.
Actually, you see, I really don't know much about Gai. I just don’t have any baseball data in my head.
Hehe.
Do you dislike baseball?
I don't have enough interest to say I dislike it. That's simply it. I didn’t even know Gai was popular. I'm sorry.
But honestly, Gai is a nice guy, right?
It seems like Gai might be a bit too kind to women. That poor fiancée of his.
I feel sorry for her.
Was Gai always that type of person?
Hmm.
I don't think he used to be like that.
People change once they become famous, you know.
Rather than refreshing, he gives off an impression of being loose with women.
Hey,
what's your relationship with her?
We've been friends since school, and she’s my best friend's fiancée.
Phew.
So, the three of you seemed to get along well.
Yeah, well, now that you mention it.
That's something to be envious of.
She looks like an intellectual beauty, doesn't she?
Is she the daughter of that Dern family?
That Dern family...
You know, the prominent family whose parents have been living apart.
Ah, that's true.
But I'd prefer you not to mention that in front of her.
Oh, right, I'm sorry. It was just a bit of curiosity.
She looks like an intellectual beauty, doesn't she?
She seems kind of pitiful, though. When she's alone, her expression really drops.
Yeah.
It seems hard to even approach her.
I wonder if she’s okay.
Please keep an eye on her a bit.
Do you know about the serial murder case?
Yeah, that one, right? The incidents that happened in Los Angeles and San Francisco. I'm worried about where the missing body parts went.
It's definitely perverts who do things like that.
You can't really know. These kinds of cases are often committed by people who look perfectly normal.
At school, we say that girls should be careful with each other. But maybe the perpetrator won't come around this area.
No, there are a lot of similar incidents, so it’s better to be cautious.
Yeah, I get it. After all, I’m the daughter of a celebrity.
But the fact that I don’t look like that is the kicker.
I'm so over scary crime stories.
